ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Conti di M. P. Manutio con l`Academia intorno le stampe
ItacWorkItem.Content: Manutio`s and other printers` list of
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The document also includes the bill of Mistro Domenico and Cornelio de Niccolini stampatori. These should be identified with Cornelio and Domenico Nicolini, the nephews of Pietro, the brother of Giovanni Antonio Nicolini da Sabbio. See the entry dedicated to Giovanni Antonio by Laura Carnelos, in DBI.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
